hero.title: AquaFix
hero.subtitle: Professional plumbing at your service. Drain unblocking, leak detection, pipe repair, and sanitary installations. On-site in 30 minutes.

areas.label: Service Areas
areas.title: We Cover the Whole Line
areas.subtitle: 24-hour plumbing service in Cascais and surrounding areas. Estimated response times from our base.
areas.ctaText: Outside these areas? Contact us — we can travel further.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Got Questions?
faq.subtitle: The most common questions from our customers. Didn't find your answer? Give us a call.
faq.a1: We operate 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. Emergencies, public holidays and weekends — we're always available.
faq.q2: What is the response time for emergencies?
faq.a2: In most areas along the Cascais line we guarantee on-site arrival within 30 minutes. For urgent cases like burst pipes or flooding, we prioritise immediate response.
faq.a3: Yes. Every quote is free, detailed and with no obligation. We never start any work without prior approval and an agreed price.
faq.a4: Yes. All our technicians hold professional certification and full plumbing credentials. All work is covered by public liability insurance.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept cash, bank transfer, MB Way and card. We issue an invoice or receipt for all completed work.
faq.q6: Do you offer a guarantee on your work?
faq.a6: Yes. All work comes with a guarantee. If any issue arises from a service we performed, we will return at no extra charge.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Available 24 hours a day. Call, message, or fill in the form.
contact.submitNote: On submit, WhatsApp opens with your message pre-filled.

footer.tagline: Professional 24-hour plumber serving the Cascais coastline.

reviews.label: Reviews
reviews.title: What Our Customers Say
reviews.subtitle: Over 180 verified reviews on Google. See what our customers think about our work.
reviews.r1Text: I called AquaFix at 1am with an overflowing toilet. Fixed in under 40 minutes. Professional, clean and honest with the price. Highly recommend to everyone.
reviews.r2Text: They found a leak inside my wall I'd had for months without knowing. Used equipment to locate it without opening the whole wall. Saved me a fortune in repairs. Excellent service.
reviews.r3Text: I renovated my full bathroom with AquaFix. They were punctual, cleaned up after, and the result was perfect. Fair price for the quality of work.
reviews.ctaText: Happy with our service? Your review helps other customers find us.

services.label: Services
services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: We cover every plumbing job — from urgent emergencies to full installations. Certified technicians, state-of-the-art equipment.
services.s1Desc: Unblocking sinks, toilets, baths, drains and sewer lines. High-pressure equipment. Immediate response at any hour.
services.s2Desc: Precise location of hidden leaks using ultrasonic technology and inspection cameras. No unnecessary demolition or wall damage.
services.s3Desc: Replacement of old pipes, burst pipe repairs, and hot/cold water network upgrades. All work fully guaranteed.
services.s4Desc: Full bathroom fitting — toilets, basins, showers, baths, and taps. Professional installation from start to finish.
services.s5Desc: Installation, replacement, and servicing of water heaters, boilers, and storage heaters of all major brands. With warranty.
services.s6Desc: Fixing dripping taps, broken cisterns, mixer taps, and all everyday small plumbing repairs handled quickly.
services.ctaText: Our team is available 24 hours a day. Call now and get help on-site in under 30 minutes.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Trusted Plumbers in Cascais
about.description: AquaFix was founded to bring truly professional plumbing services to the Cascais coastline. With over 15 years of experience, our team of certified technicians handles everything — from a simple dripping tap to emergency pipe bursts in the middle of the night.
about.paragraph2: We know plumbing problems don't wait. That's why we guarantee fast response times, transparent diagnostics, and no-surprise quotes. We work with top-tier brands and use the latest equipment, including inspection cameras and ultrasonic leak detectors.
about.highlight1Text: Certified technicians with professional credentials and full liability insurance. All work guaranteed.
about.highlight2Text: Detailed quote before any work begins. No hidden fees, no invoice surprises.
about.highlight3Text: Emergencies don't keep office hours. Our team is on call every day, including holidays and weekends.
